clusters.title: Why Vladimir Putin may be the big winner from the Iran war
clusters.neutral_headline: Putin May Benefit From Iran War

items.title: Why Vladimir Putin may be the big winner from the Iran war
items.standfirst: President Vladimir Putin may have lost an ally, but the Iran war could prove a boon for Russia, whose economy depends on energy exports.
items.content: President Vladimir Putin may have lost an ally, but the Iran war could prove a boon for Russia, whose economy depends on energy exports.
